error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

omnik-local.title: Omnik inverter
omnik-local.subtitle: Enter the IP address of your Omnik inverter.
omnik-local.ip_hint: Enter the IP address of your Omnik inverter's WiFi stick. The app will auto-detect the rest.
omnik-local.auth_explainer: The inverter's web interface requires authentication. Default credentials are usually admin / admin, unless your installer changed them.
omnik-local.manual_explainer: We could not auto-detect your inverter's serial number. Please enter the WiFi stick's serial number manually. It is printed on a sticker on the WiFi stick itself (10 digits, usually starting with 160, 161, 604 or 646).
omnik-local.confirm_subtitle: The values below were just read from your inverter. Click Add device to continue.

error.missing_wifi_sn: Please provide a numeric WiFi S/N
error.host_unreachable: Could not reach the Omnik inverter at this IP address. Make sure the IP address is correct and the inverter is on.
error.connection_timed_out: A timeout occurred while connecting to your Omnik inverter.
error.unexpected_response: Received an unexpected response from your Omnik inverter. The app supports the legacy 0x68 protocol on TCP/8899 and the /js/status.js HTTP fallback. Please share your model on GitHub if neither works.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check the username and password.
error.adding_device:
Something went wrong while adding the device.

It might be that the inverter has already been added as a device.

help.click_here_documentation: Click here to view the documentation.
